name: property managers handling 5–15 lease agreements/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 lease agreements/month, missed renewal reminders cause revenue loss. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking of lease agreements.
problem_solved: Timely reminders for lease renewals are often missed, causing potential revenue loss.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Timely reminders for lease renewals are often missed, causing potential revenue loss.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 5–15 lease agreements/month, missed renewal reminders cause revenue loss. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking of lease agreements.

one_liner: For property managers processing 5–15 lease agreements/month, missed renewal reminders cause revenue loss. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking of lease agreements.
